name: 戦闘不能
爆弾対象
不死身
毒
暗闇
沈黙
激昂
混乱
魅了
睡眠
-NEW↓ Read Note-
note:
I repurposed states to show the current objective from the save
selection window.
 - Made some modifications to Yanfly’s SaveCore so that the state affecting actor 1 (Kohaku) can be displayed from the file selection menu.
 - Modified CE 176 and created CE 215 in order to accommodate the feature.

name: 茶柱塾へ向かうも！
